violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a clean and sanitized container. -Raw meat stored in Walmart bags not food grade bags.--Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Raw beef above cooked chicken in the refrigerator.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Handwash sink in the main kitchen area was blocked. Needs to be available to employees.
